title: connection_device_ids.contains linear scan on every PublishKeyPackage
description: ws.rs PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE: connection_device_ids.contains(&params.device_id) performs a linear scan. In practice a connection publishes at most a handful of device IDs, so this is harmless. But using a HashSet<String> instead of Vec<String> would make intent clearer (uniqueness set) and scale better if the design ever allows many devices per connection.
